name: search_dates
description: Find the cheapest travel dates over a flexible date range. Origin and destination accept one or more comma-separated IATA airport codes (e.g. 'LHR,LGW,STN' to search all London airports).

origin.description: Departure airport IATA code(s), comma-separated (e.g. 'JFK' or 'LHR,LGW,STN').

destination.description: Arrival airport IATA code(s), comma-separated (e.g. 'JFK' or 'LHR,LGW,STN').

from_date.description: Start of the date range to search in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to_date.description: End of the date range to search in YYYY-MM-DD format.

duration.description: Trip duration in days. Required when is_round_trip is true.

is_round_trip.description: Whether to search for round-trip flights. Defaults to false.

cabin_class.description: Cabin class: ECONOMY, PREMIUM_ECONOMY, BUSINESS, or FIRST. Defaults to ECONOMY.

max_stops.description: Maximum stops: ANY, NON_STOP, ONE_STOP_OR_FEWER, or TWO_OR_FEWER_STOPS. Defaults to ANY.

passengers.description: Number of adult passengers. Defaults to 1.
